steps.title: Use the introductory modifier
steps.content: The phrase "First assigned to Britain in the 1960s Red Book" describes the international dialing prefix. Therefore, the subject immediately after the comma should be that prefix.

steps.title: Match modifier to subject
steps.content: A and B make international direct dialing the subject, and C makes switchboard operators the subject. Only a clause whose subject is the prefix avoids a dangling modifier. The answer is D.
